name: Stonycreek Golf Club
about: StonyCreek Golf Club is a comprehensive golf facility featuring an 18-hole championship course, a 9-hole par-3 course, and a large practice facility. The venue also offers indoor golf simulator bays available for hourly rental. It provides options for golfers of all skill levels, from juniors to low handicappers, with programs for private lessons, junior golf, and league play. The simulator area is a key amenity, offering a dedicated space for off-season practice, club fitting events, and lessons.
why_golfers_like_it: Features premium simulator technology with a dedicated booking system
Offers one of the largest practice facilities in central Indiana
Provides a multi-course experience with both championship and par-3 options
Hosts brand fitting events with Callaway and Mizuno
